description: Unlinked public review build of the Audio Jacobian Lens, with full cached explorers, an optional fitted phone-signature view for ASR encoder states, and curated findings pages.
interaction_boundary: The primary pages provide static sample selection, cleared-input playback, synchronized waveform/token/layer selection, cell-local hover and keyboard detail, and click-pinned candidate inspection. ASR adds a toggleable fitted phone-signature encoder view whose cells show the top phone prototype and whose hover, focus, or pinned detail shows five candidates; decoder cells show the top lexical candidate plus the realized-token rank and expose five candidates in detail. Character-length reranking, readable speech-token bands, TTS diagnostics, and recorded intervention inspection remain cached interactions. No model inference, upload, recording, generation, or intervention endpoint is present.
media_policy: Only the ten CC BY 4.0 LibriSpeech input FLACs are included. Generated LFM and Chatterbox audio remains excluded pending derived-output review.
payload_policy: Each detailed family manifest pins model/lens provenance and hashes ten reduced reports. ASR uses a speaker-held-out A2 encoder lens plus frozen train-only phone prototypes; reports publish only five bounded phone candidates per encoder cell and exclude prototype tensors, occurrence-level rows, private paths, ephemeral server IDs, and embedded audio. Character-length buckets remain separate hash-pinned files loaded only when enabled.
